Dear Traveler,

Thank you for choosing us to help plan your upcoming adventure! Tokyo is an incredible city that seamlessly blends ultramodern neon landscapes with deep-rooted traditions. I am thrilled to help you design a memorable 5-day getaway. 

With a budget of $2,500, you can absolutely have a fantastic, comfortable, and action-packed experience in Tokyo. Below is a comprehensive proposal tailored to your timeframe and budget.
